spec.description: Metrics on downstream traffic from/to clients.

spec.title: Connections
spec.description: Newly established connections per second from downstream clients.

spec.title: 2xx Requests
spec.description: Downstream requests per second with a 2xx response code.

spec.title: 2xx Requests
spec.description: Number of downstream requests with a 2xx response code processed by Airlock Microgateway.

spec.title: 4xx Requests
spec.description: Downstream requests per second with a 4xx response code.

spec.title: 3xx Requests
spec.description: Number of downstream requests with a 3xx response code processed by Airlock Microgateway.

spec.title: 5xx Requests
spec.description: Number of downstream requests with a 5xx response code processed by Airlock Microgateway.

spec.title: 4xx Requests
spec.description:
Number of downstream requests with a 4xx response code processed by Airlock Microgateway.
This includes requests blocked by Airlock Microgateway.

spec.title: 3xx Requests
spec.description: Downstream requests per second with a 3xx response code.

spec.title: 5xx Requests
spec.description: Downstream requests per second with a 5xx response code.

spec.title: Total Requests
spec.description: Total number of downstream requests processed by Airlock Microgateway.

spec.title: Total Requests
spec.description: Total downstream requests per second processed by Airlock Microgateway along with the observed error rate. The error rate includes requests blocked by Airlock Microgateway.

spec.expr:
sum (rate(envoy_http_downstream_rq_xx{envoy_response_code_class=~"[45]", envoy_http_conn_manager_prefix=~".*/hcm$",managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}"}[1m]) or on() vector(0))/
sum (rate(envoy_http_downstream_rq_total{envoy_http_conn_manager_prefix=~".*/hcm$",managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}"}[1m]))

spec.title: Data received
spec.description: Rate of traffic received from downstream clients.

spec.title: Request Error Rate
spec.description: Percentage of 4xx and 5xx downstream requests. This includes requests blocked by Airlock Microgateway.

spec.title: TCP Connections
spec.description: Number of newly established TCP connections from downstream clients.

spec.title: Data sent
spec.description: Total amount of data sent to downstream clients.

spec.title: Data received
spec.description: Total amount of data received by Airlock Microgateway from downstream clients.

spec.title: Request duration
spec.description: Percentiles of the application downstream latency over one minute.

spec.title: 1xx Requests
spec.description: Number of downstream requests with a 1xx response code processed by Airlock Microgateway.

spec.title: 1xx Requests
spec.description: Downstream requests per second with a 1xx response code.

spec.title: TLS Connections
spec.description: TLS connection handshakes and number of TLS connection errors per second.

spec.title: TLS Ciphers
spec.description: TLS Ciphers used in successful TLS connections.

spec.title: TLS Protocols
spec.description: TLS protocols by versions used in successful TLS connections.

spec.title: TLS Connection Handshakes
spec.description: Number of successful TLS handshakes from downstream clients.

spec.title: TLS Connection Error Rate
spec.description: Percentage of downstream TLS connection errors (does not include failed certificate verifications).

spec.expr:
sum (increase(envoy_listener_ssl_connection_error{envoy_listener_address!~"^(dynamic-probe|probe|metrics|admin)$", managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}"}[$__range]))/
sum (increase(envoy_listener_ssl_handshake{envoy_listener_address!~"^(dynamic-probe|probe|metrics|admin)$", managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}"}[$__range]))

spec.title: TLS Supported Groups
spec.description: TLS supported groups used in successful TLS connections.

spec.title: TLS Connection Errors
spec.description: Number of downstream TLS connection errors (does not include failed certificate verifications).

spec.title: TLS Signature Algorithms
spec.description: TLS signature algorithms used in successful mTLS connections.

spec.title: Data sent
spec.description: Rate of traffic sent to downstream clients.

spec.title: Connection Length
spec.description: Histogram on the duration of connections from downstream clients.

spec.title: Airlock Microgateway Downstream - Metrics

spec.name: operator
spec.label: Microgateway Operator
spec.description: Allows filtering on the managing operator instance.

spec.name: namespace
spec.label: Gateway Namespace
spec.description: Allows filtering on the namespaces in which gateways are deployed.

spec.name: gateway_name
spec.label: Gateway Name
spec.description: Allows filtering on specific gateway instance names within the selected namespaces.
